# SeaBreeze Home Service LLC

SeaBreeze Home Service LLC is a professional exterior home maintenance company serving San Diego County, California. Family owned, fully insured, and committed to streak-free, reliable results.

## Services

- Window Cleaning — residential and commercial, interior and exterior, water-fed pole systems
- Solar Panel Cleaning — purified water systems, maximizes panel efficiency
- Pressure Washing — driveways, patios, decks, fences, exterior walls
- Soft Washing — roofs, stucco, siding; eco-friendly low-pressure solutions
- Gutter Cleaning — debris removal, downspout flushing, full inspection
- Holiday Light Installation — design, install, and takedown service
- Permanent LED Lighting — Govee architectural roofline lighting, app-controlled

## Service Area

All of San Diego County including: La Jolla, Coronado, Del Mar, Carlsbad, Encinitas, Rancho Santa Fe, Chula Vista, Escondido, San Marcos, El Cajon, Poway, Solana Beach, Oceanside, Santee, National City, Point Loma, Vista, Mission Hills, Pacific Beach, 4S Ranch, Clairemont, Mission Valley, Carmel Valley.
